module.name: label
module.description: An outlined pill-shaped tag/badge; the body text is the label. Block module that renders inline.
module.aiSpec:
A small pill-shaped tag/badge (e.g. New, Beta, v2.0). The body text (between the directive and `<!-- @end -->`) is the label content; it may contain spaces, commas and inline Markdown. Renders inline despite being a block module, so it flows within a heading or sentence. Use @kbd for keyboard keys instead.
Parameters: - `color`: text/border colour, and fill colour when `fill` is on (any CSS colour; default var(--accent-color)). - `fill` (true|false, default false): solid filled badge (white text on the colour) instead of the outlined transparent style. - `size` (small|medium|large, default medium): badge text size. - `shape` (pill|rounded|square, default pill): corner rounding.
Example: <!-- @label color: #ef4444, fill: true, size: small --> Beta <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Color
param.desc: Text and border colour (fill colour when Fill is on).

param.name: fill
param.label: Fill
param.desc: Solid filled badge instead of an outline.

snippet.label: Label
snippet.description: Outlined tag with transparent background. Body = the label text.
